acquisition method: equipped with nanospray ion source in data-dependent acquisition analysis
alkylation reagent: alkylated (20 mM iodoacetamide; Sigma-Aldrich, St. Louis, MO, USA)
alkylation concentration: alkylated (20 mM iodoacetamide; Sigma-Aldrich, St. Louis, MO, USA)
instrument: coupled with a Q-Exactive HF-X hybrid quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer
labeling: quantified LFQ, two or more peptides
reduction reagent: 10 mM dithiothreitol, DTT; Sigma-Aldrich, St. Louis, MO, USA
reduction concentration: 10 mM dithiothreitol, DTT; Sigma-Aldrich, St. Louis, MO, USA
